# ImageCreator.Error.unsupportedInputImage

**Case**

An error that indicates the system cannot use one of the specified source images.

## Declaration

```swift
case unsupportedInputImage
```

## Getting the error codes

- **ImageCreator.Error.notSupported**: An error that indicates the device doesn’t support image generation.
- **ImageCreator.Error.unavailable**: An error that indicates image creation is currently unavailable.
- **ImageCreator.Error.creationCancelled**: An error that occurs in response to cancellation of the parent task.
- **ImageCreator.Error.faceInImageTooSmall**: An error that indicates the system cannot use one of the source images because the face in it is too small.
- **ImageCreator.Error.unsupportedLanguage**: An error that indicates the input text uses an unsupported language.
- **ImageCreator.Error.backgroundCreationForbidden**: An error that indicates the app is hidden or in the background.
- **ImageCreator.Error.creationFailed**: An error that indicates a general failure occurred during image creation.
